REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (525 - 531 Greenwich Street, San Francisco, Ca 94133)
Off Calendar Feb-11-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Andrew Schultz for Gene Marchi.

The sale was confirmed at $1,733,000.00. Bond is waived. The Court granted the petition (subject to the written order).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
